title: icy aerated croatian buttermilk ceviche
description: a refreshing twist on traditional ceviche, featuring buttermilk and a touch of confit-tomato. perfect for hot summer days.
instructions: combine buttermilk, confit tomato, dill, parsley, garlic oil, salt, and pepper in a large terracotta dish.
stir the mixture gently to combine, being careful not to break up the confit tomato.
cover the dish with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
just before serving, add the ice cubes to the dish and stir gently to combine.
allow the ceviche to sit at room temperature for 10 minutes to allow the ice to melt and the flavors to come together.
use a whisk or fork to break up any remaining ice or confit tomato clumps.
ladle the ceviche into bowls and serve immediately.
garnish with additional fresh herbs, if desired.
